ast.name: content
ast.source:
# System Control

Obsidian-native memory system control defaults for Tracekeeper.
ast.target:
# 系统控制

Tracekeeper 的 Obsidian 原生内存系统控制默认设置。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
# Memory Policy

- Writing is permissioned.
- Vault scope: vault-root only.
ast.target:
# 内存策略

- 写入需经授权。
- 作用域：仅限保险库根目录。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
# Permissions

- Default: read-only for automation.
- User confirmation required for memory writes.
ast.target:
# 权限

- 默认：自动化操作为只读。
- 内存写入需用户确认。

ast.name: content
ast.target:
# 知识索引

- [[memory/index|内存]]
- [[wiki/index|维基]]
- [[sources/index|来源]]

ast.name: content
ast.source:
# Project Memory Index

Project-level memory indexes live here.
ast.target:
# 项目内存索引

项目级内存索引存放于此。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
# Wiki Hubs

Create topic hubs here and link related memory from each hub.
ast.target:
# 维基枢纽

在此创建主题枢纽，并从每个枢纽链接相关内存。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
# Sources Index

Source notes and captured references live here.
ast.target:
# 来源索引

来源笔记和捕获的引用存放于此。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [read-only] Use for a quick vault and service summary. Does not read full note content or write files.
ast.target: [只读] 用于快速查看保险库和服务摘要。不读取完整笔记内容或写入文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault root path. If omitted, uses server configured --vault-root.
ast.target: 保险库根路径。如果省略，则使用服务器配置的 --vault-root。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Use tracekeeper.lint for graph checks. This compatibility tool is read-only.
ast.target: [已弃用] 使用 tracekeeper.lint 进行图谱检查。此兼容性工具为只读。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of array entries to return.
ast.target: 要返回的最大数组条目数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Graph checking mode. Defaults to the server graphProfile setting.
ast.target: 图谱检查模式。默认为服务器的 graphProfile 设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [low-risk write] Call once when starting meaningful work. Records a bounded task and returns the recommended recall step.
ast.target: [低风险写入] 在开始有意义的工作时调用一次。记录一个有界任务并返回推荐的召回步骤。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [read-only] Use before read_note to find relevant memory, wiki, and source notes. Supports global, project, and project_history scopes.
ast.target: [只读] 在 read_note 之前使用，以查找相关的内存、维基和来源笔记。支持全局、项目和 project_history 作用域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Recall query text. Required unless scope is project_history.
ast.target: 召回查询文本。除非作用域为 project_history，否则为必填项。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 召回作用域。默认为全局。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于作用域匹配的项目提示。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于作用域匹配的项目 ID。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于作用域匹配的仓库/路径前缀。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alias of repo_path for repository-scoped matching.
ast.target: repo_path 的别名，用于仓库作用域匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alias of repo_path for workspace/project path matching.
ast.target: repo_path 的别名，用于工作区/项目路径匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of matches to return.

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Use tracekeeper.recall with scope="project". Compatibility tool, read-only.
ast.target: [已弃用] 使用 tracekeeper.recall 并设置 scope=\"project\"。兼容性工具，只读。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 项目作用域的召回查询。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Use tracekeeper.recall with scope="project_history". Compatibility tool, read-only.
ast.target: [已弃用] 使用 tracekeeper.recall 并设置 scope=\"project_history\"。兼容性工具，只读。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of entries to return.

ast.name: description
ast.source: [read-only] Read one vault note only after recall excerpts are not enough. Does not write files.
ast.target: [只读] 仅在召回摘录不足时读取一个保险库笔记。不写入文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [read-only] Inspect pending proposals or approved writeback candidates. Does not approve or apply changes.
ast.target: [只读] 检查待处理的提案或已批准的回写候选项。不批准或应用更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Review Queue action. Defaults to list_pending.
ast.target: 审查队列操作。默认为 list_pending。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional proposal kind or target-note prefix filter for approved proposals.
ast.target: 可选的提案类型或目标笔记前缀过滤器，用于已批准的提案。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Use tracekeeper.review_queue with action="list_pending". Compatibility tool, read-only.
ast.target: [已弃用] 使用 tracekeeper.review_queue 并设置 action=\"list_pending\"。兼容性工具，只读。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 待处理条目的最大数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Use tracekeeper.source_request with action="list". Compatibility tool, read-only.
ast.target: [已弃用] 使用 tracekeeper.source_request 并设置 action=\"list\"。兼容性工具，只读。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of pending requests to return.
ast.target: 要返回的最大待处理请求数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional status filter, defaults to pending.
ast.target: 可选的状态过滤器，默认为 pending。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 可选的来源类型过滤器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Use tracekeeper.review_queue with action="list_approved". Compatibility tool, read-only.
ast.target: [已弃用] 使用 tracekeeper.review_queue 并设置 action=\"list_approved\"。兼容性工具，只读。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional proposal kind or target-note prefix filter.
ast.target: 可选的提案类型或目标笔记前缀过滤器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of approved writebacks to return.
ast.target: 要返回的最大已批准回写数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Prefer the Obsidian runtime log view. Compatibility tool, read-only.
ast.target: [已弃用] 优先使用 Obsidian 运行时日志视图。兼容性工具，只读。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [read-only | low-risk write] List source requests or analyze one existing request. Does not fetch network content.
ast.target: [只读 | 低风险写入] 列出来源请求或分析一个现有请求。不获取网络内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Source request action. Defaults to list unless request_path/path is provided.
ast.target: 来源请求操作。除非提供了 request_path/path，否则默认为 list。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to an agent-request note when action is analyze.
ast.target: 当操作为 analyze 时，指向代理请求笔记的保险库相对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional task id to update with generated source/proposal paths.
ast.target: 可选的任务 ID，用于更新生成的来源/提案路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to update request status to completed/failed. Defaults to true.
ast.target: 是否将请求状态更新为 completed/failed。默认为 true。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Process request even if status is not pending.
ast.target: 即使状态不是 pending 也处理请求。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of pending requests to return when listing.
ast.target: 列出时返回的最大待处理请求数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional status filter when listing, defaults to pending.
ast.target: 列出时可选的状态过滤器，默认为 pending。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional source kind filter when listing.
ast.target: 列出时可选的来源类型过滤器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Use tracekeeper.source_request with action="analyze". Compatibility tool, low-risk write.
ast.target: [已弃用] 使用 tracekeeper.source_request 并设置 action=\"analyze\"。兼容性工具，低风险写入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vault-relative path to an agent-request note.
ast.target: 指向代理请求笔记的保险库相对路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [review-gated apply] Use only after the user approves a Review Queue proposal. Appends approved content to the target note.
ast.target: [审查后应用] 仅在用户批准审查队列提案后使用。将已批准的内容追加到目标笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 保险库相对提案笔记路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional task id to update with the applied writeback target.
ast.target: 可选的任务 ID，用于更新已应用的回写目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When true, return the writeback plan without modifying files.
ast.target: 为 true 时，返回回写计划而不修改文件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [read-only | optional write] Build a compact context pack from recall results. Writes an artifact only when write=true.
ast.target: [只读 | 可选写入] 从召回结果构建紧凑的上下文包。仅当 write=true 时写入工件。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 可选的任务 ID，用于可追溯性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to write a markdown context-pack artifact.
ast.target: 是否写入 markdown 上下文包工件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional note title when writing markdown artifact.
ast.target: 写入 markdown 工件时可选的笔记标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [read-only] Run the single vault check entry for structure, links, sources, claims, and graph health.
ast.target: [只读] 运行单个保险库检查条目，检查结构、链接、来源、声明和图谱健康状况。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of issues to return.

ast.name: description
ast.source: [low-risk write] Required once at task closeout. Record the session and submit durable decisions, solution changes, lessons, preferences, next actions, and memory candidates according to memory rules.
ast.target: [低风险写入] 在任务结束时必须调用一次。记录会话并根据内存规则提交持久决策、解决方案变更、经验教训、偏好、后续操作和内存候选项。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 可选的内存作用域覆盖。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 可选的相关维基笔记引用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Use tracekeeper.finish_task. Compatibility tool for older session distillation flows.
ast.target: [已弃用] 使用 tracekeeper.finish_task。用于旧版会话蒸馏流程的兼容性工具。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Use tracekeeper.build_context_pack with write=true. Compatibility tool, low-risk write.
ast.target: [已弃用] 使用 tracekeeper.build_context_pack 并设置 write=true。兼容性工具，低风险写入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional file stem. If omitted, auto-generates one.
ast.target: 可选的文件词干。如果省略，则自动生成一个。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 上下文包 Markdown/文本内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [deprecated] Use tracekeeper.finish_task. Compatibility tool, low-risk write.
ast.target: [已弃用] 使用 tracekeeper.finish_task。兼容性工具，低风险写入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [low-risk write] Save user-provided source metadata or content under sources. Does not fetch external content.
ast.target: [低风险写入] 将用户提供的源元数据或内容保存到 sources 下。不获取外部内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Source identifier (usually URL or local path).
ast.target: 源标识符（通常是 URL 或本地路径）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Required when mode is extracted_snapshot or local_copy.
ast.target: 当模式为 extracted_snapshot 或 local_copy 时必需。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 内容的别名，用于兼容性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: [low-risk write] Submit a memory update through Tracekeeper rules. Global memory stays review-gated by default.
ast.target: [低风险写入] 通过 Tracekeeper 规则提交内存更新。全局内存默认保持审查门控。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional project hint for project memory routing.
ast.target: 可选的项目提示，用于项目内存路由。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Start a task with a read-only context summary.
ast.target: 以只读上下文摘要启动任务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate matching notes for fast recall.
ast.target: 生成匹配的笔记以便快速回忆。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Core system note path if present.
ast.target: 核心系统笔记路径（如果存在）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Active-context note for current memory state.
ast.target: 当前内存状态的活动上下文笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 最近的代理任务和审查跟踪。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Claim block has no source references

ast.name: title
ast.source: Tracekeeper MCP Server (read-only default + controlled write + review-gated apply)
ast.target: Tracekeeper MCP 服务器（默认只读 + 受控写入 + 审查门控应用）
